change_summary: Increase the mass of the structure to 36 kg

cascade_issues.title: Mass constraint violation
cascade_issues.description: The total mass of the payload exceeds the platform accommodation envelope by 1 kg, violating the requirement L1-MAS-001.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal margin reduction
cascade_issues.description: Increasing the mass of the structure may alter thermal properties and reduce the ΔT margin, potentially violating L1-THM-001.

cascade_issues.title: Potential structural integrity impact
cascade_issues.description: Increasing the mass of the structure may affect its structural integrity and natural frequencies, requiring reanalysis.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
missing_tests.reason: The change may affect the structural dynamics, necessitating a reevaluation of shock response.
